overview: SocialVerse is a social media super app combining Instagram, YouTube, Netflix, and WhatsApp features. Users can sign up with real accounts, upload photos and videos that all users can see, like and comment on posts, chat with each other, and follow their favorite creators — all backed by a real persistent backend.
features: Real login and account creation with persistent user profiles
Photo and video uploads visible to all users in the feed
Instagram-style home feed with likes, comments, and follows
Vertical Reels video player with real uploaded content
WhatsApp-style real-time chat with message persistence
Explore page with trending content and top creators
User profiles with follower/following counts and post grids
Full PWA installable on phone home screen
